label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's look at the question. It asks what GM companies promise farmers they will benefit from. The options are A to D. First, I need to find the relevant part of the text. The passage mentions that GM companies tell farmers they will make good profits by saving money on pesticides. Then it says that in reality, pesticide use has increased. The quote from Bill Christison also says the promise was to use less chemicals and production, but that's not true. So the promise is about using less chemicals (which is option B) and increased production (which isn't one of the options here). The question is only asking about what the companies promised farmers
